en.title: Best Collagen Powder 2026: Vital Proteins, Nutricost, Transparent Labs Tested and Ranked
en.description: The collagen peptide powders worth buying in 2026, ranked on sourcing, third-party testing, dosage, mixability, and cost per serving.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳膠原蛋白粉排行榜：Vital Proteins、Nutricost、Transparent Labs 實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年值得買的膠原蛋白胜肽粉，從來源、第三方檢驗、劑量、溶解度到每份成本完整排名。

en.description: 20 g of grass-fed, pasture-raised type I and III bovine collagen per serving with the smoothest mixability I have tested, backed by independent Swift lab testing and a cGMP facility.

en.description: 22 g of hydrolyzed grass-fed bovine collagen per serving, the highest dose here, with Informed Sport and Informed Choice certifications and a fully disclosed label.

zh-tw.description: 每份 22 克水解草飼牛膠原蛋白，是這份榜單裡劑量最高的，通過 Informed Sport 與 Informed Choice 認證，成分表完全透明。

en.description: 11 g of grass-fed bovine collagen per scoop, unflavored and additive-free, with third-party testing at one of the lowest costs per serving on the market.

zh-tw.description: 每匙 11 克草飼牛膠原蛋白，無味無添加，通過第三方檢驗，每份成本是市場上最低的其中之一。

en.description: 20 g of hydrolyzed collagen from ten sources covering types I, II, III, V and X, plus SBO probiotics and vitamin C for the widest type coverage here.

zh-tw.description: 每份 20 克水解膠原蛋白，來自十種來源涵蓋第一、二、三、五、十型，另加土壤益生菌與維他命 C，是這份榜單型別覆蓋最全的。

en.description: 13 g of grass-fed collagen paired with nicotinamide riboside and a patented black currant polyphenol blend, formulated for skin texture and moisture with clinically studied ingredients.

en.description: 11 g of type I and III hydrolyzed bovine collagen per scoop with an Informed Choice certification, a very mild taste, and fast cold-water dissolution.

zh-tw.description: 每匙 11 克第一與第三型水解牛膠原蛋白，通過 Informed Choice 認證，味道很淡，冷水也能快速溶解。

en.description: Pasture-raised collagen with added vitamin C, zinc and copper to support synthesis, carrying NSF Certified for Sport testing against over 270 banned substances.

en.description: Hydrolyzed marine collagen with hyaluronic acid and vitamin C, ISO-verified lab reports, and low molecular weight peptides for absorption at a budget price.

en.description: Grass-fed bovine collagen tested for purity and designed for prenatal and postpartum needs, with practitioner-grade sourcing and full batch transparency.

zh-tw.description: 草飼牛膠原蛋白，檢驗純度，專為孕期與產後需求設計，用的是臨床等級來源，逐批資訊完全透明。

en.description: Multi-source collagen covering types I, II, III, V and X with biotin, hyaluronic acid and vitamin C at 82 servings per tub, the cheapest cost per serving here.

references.title: 9 Best Collagen Powders of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)

en.commentary: Collagen powder is the single product driving the whole beauty-from-within category right now, and after working through the field I keep landing on the same answer: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides is the one to beat. The 20 g serving of grass-fed type I and III collagen dissolves cleaner than anything else I stirred into cold water, and that mixability matters because the powder you actually finish is the powder that works. It carries independent Swift lab testing and cGMP production, so the quality holds up to the price. Transparent Labs takes second on raw substance. At 22 g per serving it is the highest dose here, and the Informed Sport certification plus a single-ingredient unflavored option makes it my pick for anyone who wants maximum collagen with a label they can read top to bottom. Nutricost earns third purely on value. You get grass-fed collagen and third-party testing at a cost per serving the premium brands cannot touch, and for a daily consumable that math compounds fast. Where you land below the top three depends on what you want the collagen to do. Thorne Collagen Plus builds in nicotinamide riboside and black currant polyphenols for skin, Gnarly Collagen Pro is the athlete's choice with NSF Certified for Sport screening against 270-plus banned substances, and CollagenUP is the marine and budget option with hyaluronic acid built in. Every product here is worth buying. The ranking reflects which one I would reach for first.

highlights.title: Vital Proteins wins on the thing you use daily: mixability
highlights.body: A collagen powder only works if you keep taking it, and Vital Proteins dissolves into cold water with no grit or clumping, which is the difference between a tub you finish and one that sits in the cupboard. Pair that texture with 20 g of grass-fed type I and III collagen, independent Swift lab testing, and cGMP production, and it earns the top spot on the fundamentals rather than marketing.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs is the highest dose with a label you can fully read
highlights.body: At 22 g of hydrolyzed grass-fed collagen per serving it delivers the most protein per scoop in this field, and the unflavored version lists exactly one ingredient. Add Informed Sport and Informed Choice certifications and it becomes the clear choice for anyone who wants maximum collagen without a proprietary blend hiding the details.

highlights.title: Nutricost proves you do not need to overpay for grass-fed collagen
highlights.body: Grass-fed bovine collagen, third-party testing, and no additives at one of the lowest costs per serving on the market. For a supplement you take every single day, the price gap between Nutricost and the premium tier compounds over months, and the quality floor is high enough that I recommend it without hesitation to anyone starting out.

highlights.title: Buy for the outcome you want, not just the brand
highlights.body: Thorne Collagen Plus adds nicotinamide riboside and black currant polyphenols for skin texture and moisture, Gnarly Collagen Pro carries NSF Certified for Sport screening for competitive athletes, and CollagenUP uses marine collagen with hyaluronic acid at a budget price. The best tub for you is the one built around your actual goal, whether that is skin, sport, or cost.

zh-tw.commentary: 膠原蛋白粉現在是驅動整個美容內服類目成長最猛的單品，我把市面上主流的幾款都試過一輪，結論很明確，Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides 就是那個要被超越的標竿。每份 20 克草飼第一與第三型膠原蛋白，倒進冷水裡溶得比我試過的任何一款都乾淨，這點很重要，因為你真的會喝完的那罐才是有效的那罐。它有獨立 Swift 實驗室檢驗加 cGMP 廠房生產，品質撐得起這個價位。Transparent Labs 拿下第二，靠的是實打實的份量。每份 22 克是這份榜單裡劑量最高的，加上 Informed Sport 認證跟單一成分無味版本，對想要膠原含量拉到最高、成分表又能從頭讀到尾的人來說，這款就是我的首選。Nutricost 排第三純粹靠性價比。草飼膠原加第三方檢驗，每份成本卻是高階品牌追不上的，對一款每天都要喝的耗材來說，這筆帳長期下來差很大。第三名以下要看你想讓膠原蛋白做什麼。Thorne Collagen Plus 加了菸鹼醯胺核糖跟黑醋栗多酚顧膚質，Gnarly Collagen Pro 是運動員首選，通過 NSF Certified for Sport 針對 270 多種禁用物質的篩檢，CollagenUP 則是海洋膠原加玻尿酸的平價選擇。老實說這份榜單上每一款都值得買，排名只是反映我會先伸手拿哪一罐。

highlights.title: Vital Proteins 贏在你每天都會用到的那件事：好溶解
highlights.body: 膠原蛋白粉要有效，前提是你得持續喝下去，而 Vital Proteins 倒進冷水就化開，沒有顆粒感也不結塊，這就是一罐會被你喝完跟一罐擺在櫃子裡積灰的差別。這個口感再配上每份 20 克草飼第一與第三型膠原蛋白、獨立 Swift 實驗室檢驗跟 cGMP 生產，它是靠基本功坐上第一，不是靠行銷。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 是劑量最高、成分表又能完全讀懂的那款
highlights.body: 每份 22 克水解草飼膠原蛋白，是這份榜單裡每匙蛋白質最多的，而且無味版成分表就只列一項東西。再加上 Informed Sport 與 Informed Choice 認證，對想要膠原含量最大化、又不想被複方配方藏細節的人來說，這款是明確的選擇。

highlights.title: Nutricost 證明買草飼膠原不用花冤枉錢
highlights.body: 草飼牛膠原、第三方檢驗、零添加，每份成本卻是市場上最低的其中之一。對一款每天都要喝的補給品來說，Nutricost 跟高階價位帶之間的價差，幾個月下來會滾出可觀的差距，而它的品質底線夠高，我會毫不猶豫推薦給剛開始吃膠原的人。

highlights.title: 照你的目標挑，別只看品牌
highlights.body: Thorne Collagen Plus 加了菸鹼醯胺核糖跟黑醋栗多酚顧膚質保濕，Gnarly Collagen Pro 通過 NSF Certified for Sport 篩檢適合競技運動員，CollagenUP 用海洋膠原加玻尿酸走平價路線。最適合你的那一罐，是圍繞你真正的目標打造的那罐，看你要顧皮膚、拚運動，還是省荷包。

references.title: 9 Best Collagen Powders of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)
8 best collagen supplements and powders for 2026

en.commentary: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides stays my number one, and this month gives me two fresh reasons to keep it there. The formula is still the cleanest starting point in the category, a single ingredient of 20 grams of type I and type III peptides that dissolved smoother in cool water than anything else I stirred this round. It carries the NSF Certified for Sport mark, which is the certification I trust most for anyone who cares what actually goes into the tub. For 2026 the brand also redesigned the packaging to use 90 percent less plastic, with the box now at least 80 percent paperboard from FSC certified forests. That is a real move, and it matters to buyers who read labels for more than macros. Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Collagen holds second on the strength of the highest verified dose and elite third-party testing, my pick for people who track certifications first. Nutricost stays third as the value workhorse, delivering clean peptides at the lowest cost per serving in the group. I will keep saying the honest part: the science on collagen benefits is still mixed and more studies are needed, so buy for the protein quality and the mixability rather than a guaranteed glow. Thorne and Gnarly remain the choices for the strictest testing standards. Buy on what you value. Clean and mixable points to Vital Proteins, and lowest cost per scoop points to Nutricost.

highlights.title: Vital Proteins keeps the clean-label crown
highlights.body: One ingredient, 20 grams of type I and III peptides, and the smoothest mix in cool water this round. The NSF Certified for Sport mark is the certification I trust most.

highlights.title: Greener packaging for 2026
highlights.body: The redesigned box uses 90 percent less plastic and is at least 80 percent FSC certified paperboard. A real move that matters to buyers who read more than the macro panel.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs for the certification hawks
highlights.body: Second place goes to the highest verified dose paired with elite third-party testing. It is my pick for anyone who checks the lab paperwork before the price.

highlights.title: The honest caveat
highlights.body: The science on collagen benefits stays mixed and more studies are needed. Buy for protein quality and mixability, and treat any skin or joint glow as a bonus rather than a promise.

zh-tw.commentary: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides 續坐我心中第一,這個月又給了我兩個理由讓它留著。它的配方還是全品類最乾淨的起點,單一成分、20 克第一型跟第三型胜肽,這輪我沖下來,它在冷水裡溶得比誰都順。它掛著 NSF Certified for Sport 認證,你要是真的在乎罐子裡到底裝了什麼,這張認證我最信。2026 年這牌子還把包裝重新設計,塑膠用量砍掉九成,外盒現在至少八成是 FSC 認證森林來的紙板。這是玩真的,對那種看標籤不只看熱量的買家來說很有感。Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Collagen 守第二,靠的是全場最高的實測劑量加頂級第三方檢驗,推給那種先看認證再看別的人。Nutricost 穩坐第三,是划算主力,乾淨胜肽加上全組最低的每份成本。老實話我還是要講,膠原蛋白到底有沒有效,科學證據還是各說各話,還需要更多研究,所以買它是看蛋白質品質跟好不好泡,別當成保證變漂亮。Thorne 跟 Gnarly 仍是給最龜毛檢驗標準的人選。照你在乎什麼買,乾淨好泡選 Vital Proteins,每匙最便宜選 Nutricost。

highlights.title: Vital Proteins 續戴乾淨標籤王冠
highlights.body: 單一成分、20 克第一與第三型胜肽,這輪冷水裡泡得最順。NSF Certified for Sport 認證是我最信的一張。

highlights.title: 2026 更環保的包裝
highlights.body: 重新設計的外盒塑膠砍九成,至少八成是 FSC 認證紙板。玩真的,對看標籤不只看熱量的人很有感。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 給認證控
highlights.body: 第二名靠全場最高實測劑量加頂級第三方檢驗。先翻實驗報告再看價格的人,我推它。

highlights.title: 老實話的但書
highlights.body: 膠原蛋白到底有沒有效,證據還是各說各話,還需要更多研究。買它看蛋白質品質跟好不好泡,皮膚關節有變好就當額外賺到。

references.title: 9 Best Collagen Powders of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)

en.commentary: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides stays my top pick and the latest reviews keep reinforcing why. Twenty grams of type I and III collagen, NSF Certified for Sport, and it dissolves clean in a shaker with zero chunks, which is exactly what most people actually want day to day. I also like that the brand just moved to packaging with over 40 percent less carbon emissions, a nice bonus even if it does not change the scoop. Transparent Labs Grass Fed Collagen holds second because it gives you 22 grams per serving from grass fed hide and posts full third party test results with a certificate of analysis, so there is no guessing about what you are drinking. Nutricost stays third as the value champion, since it delivers a clean peptide at a price nothing premium can match. Ancient Nutrition and Thorne round out the strong middle for anyone who wants a multi collagen blend or the most rigorous testing pedigree. Sports Research and Gnarly remain reliable, and California Gold CollagenUp is still the budget grab I point people toward when they want to try collagen without committing much cash. Needed and Micro Ingredients close out the ten, both perfectly fine for their niche. Nothing shifted this week because the category is mature and the leaders keep passing the tests that matter, so I kept the order exactly where it was.

highlights.title: Vital Proteins stays on top
highlights.body: 20g of type I and III, NSF Certified for Sport, and it mixes clean with no chunks.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs is transparent
highlights.body: 22g per serving from grass fed hide with a full published certificate of analysis.

highlights.title: Nutricost wins value
highlights.body: A clean peptide at a price no premium brand can touch keeps it at number three.

highlights.title: Budget entry point
highlights.body: California Gold CollagenUp is the low cost way to test collagen before committing.

zh-tw.commentary: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides 我還是放第一,最近的評測一直在幫我背書。20 克第一型加第三型膠原,拿到 NSF 運動認證,搖搖杯一搖就化開零顆粒,這就是大多數人每天真正要的東西。我也很欣賞它剛換的新包裝,碳排比舊款少超過 40 %,雖然不影響一匙的效果,但加分。Transparent Labs Grass Fed Collagen 守第二,每份 22 克草飼牛皮膠原,還把第三方檢測跟成分分析報告全公開,喝進去什麼一清二楚。Nutricost 續坐第三性價比王,乾淨的胜肽價格卻是頂級品牌追不上的。Ancient Nutrition 跟 Thorne 撐住強悍中段,想要多重膠原配方或最嚴檢測背景的就選它們。Sports Research 跟 Gnarly 一樣可靠,California Gold CollagenUp 則是我推給想試膠原又不想花大錢的人的入門款。Needed 跟 Micro Ingredients 收尾,各自的定位都夠用。這週沒動,因為這個類別已經很成熟,前段班該過的檢測都過了,我就把順序原封不動留著。

highlights.title: Vital Proteins 續坐第一
highlights.body: 20 克一三型膠原,NSF 運動認證,搖開零顆粒。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 夠透明
highlights.body: 每份 22 克草飼牛皮膠原,還把成分分析報告全公開。

highlights.title: Nutricost 拿下性價比
highlights.body: 乾淨胜肽價格頂級品牌追不上,第三名穩。

highlights.title: 入門就選它
highlights.body: California Gold CollagenUp 是想試膠原又不想花大錢的低價選擇。

references.title: 9 Best Collagen Powders of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)
Best Collagen Supplements of 2026 for Energy, Joints & Skin Health

en.commentary: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides keeps my top spot because it does the fundamentals better than anything else and now backs them with cleaner sourcing proof. It delivers 20 grams of type I and III collagen per serving, which is exactly what you want for skin, hair, and nails, and it dissolves completely with no chunks in a shaker. When BarBend sent it to an independent lab, it landed in the top 10 percent for metals, pesticides, phthalates, bisphenols, and label accuracy, earning an A in every category. That is the kind of third-party proof I want to see, and it is why the 9.6 mixability and 9.2 testing scores hold. Vital Proteins also refreshed its packaging for 2026 to use 90 percent less plastic with FSC-certified paperboard, a nice bonus that does not change the powder but does reflect a brand that is paying attention. Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Collagen stays second on the strength of the highest testing and dosage scores in the group at 9.6 and 9.7, the pick for anyone who wants maximum grams and certifications. Nutricost Collagen Peptides holds third and remains the value champion at a 9.8 value score, proof you do not need to spend big to get clean type I and III collagen. Ancient Nutrition Multi Collagen keeps fourth for people who want all five main collagen types in one scoop. I made no changes this week. The order reflects sourcing quality, verified testing, and honest dosage, and each pick earns its place on those terms.

highlights.title: Vital Proteins nails the fundamentals
highlights.body: 20 grams of type I and III collagen per serving dissolves cleanly with no chunks. It is built for skin, hair, and nails, and it does that job better than anything else.

highlights.title: Independent lab gave it straight As
highlights.body: BarBend's lab test placed it in the top 10 percent for metals, pesticides, phthalates, bisphenols, and label accuracy, supporting its 9.2 testing score.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs is the certification pick
highlights.body: The highest testing and dosage scores here at 9.6 and 9.7 make it the choice for anyone who wants maximum grams and third-party certifications.

highlights.title: Nutricost is the value champion
highlights.body: A 9.8 value score proves you can get clean type I and III collagen without spending big. The smart budget pick.

highlights.title: Greener packaging, same powder
highlights.body: Vital Proteins' 2026 refresh cuts plastic by 90 percent with FSC paperboard. It does not change the formula, but it reflects a brand paying attention.

zh-tw.commentary: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides 這次還是我的第一，因為它把基本功做得比誰都好，現在還多了更乾淨的原料檢驗背書。每份給你 20 克第一型跟第三型膠原，這正是護膚、護髮、護甲要的，丟進搖搖杯完全溶解、沒有結塊。BarBend 送獨立實驗室檢測，重金屬、農藥、塑化劑、雙酚、標示準確度全部落在前 10%，每一項都拿 A。這種第三方證明就是我想看到的，也是溶解度 9.6、檢驗 9.2 守得住的原因。Vital Proteins 2026 還換了新包裝，塑膠用量少 90%，改用 FSC 認證紙板，這算加分，粉末本身沒變，但看得出這牌子有在用心。Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Collagen 守住第二，靠的是全組最高的檢驗跟劑量分 9.6 跟 9.7，想要最高克數加最多認證的就選它。Nutricost Collagen Peptides 守住第三，還是性價比之王，性價比 9.8，證明你不用花大錢也能拿到乾淨的第一型跟第三型膠原。Ancient Nutrition Multi Collagen 守住第四，想要一匙就吃到五大主要膠原型別的選它。這週我沒動順序。排名反映的是原料品質、驗證過的檢測、跟誠實的劑量，每一款都是靠這些站上自己的位置。

highlights.title: Vital Proteins 基本功最扎實
highlights.body: 每份 20 克第一型跟第三型膠原，搖搖杯完全溶解沒結塊。專為護膚護髮護甲設計，這件事它做得比誰都好。

highlights.title: 獨立實驗室給全 A
highlights.body: BarBend 送檢，重金屬、農藥、塑化劑、雙酚、標示準確度全落前 10%,撐住檢驗 9.2 分。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 認證最齊
highlights.body: 檢驗 9.6、劑量 9.7 全組最高，想要最高克數加最多第三方認證的就選它。

highlights.title: Nutricost 是性價比之王
highlights.body: 性價比 9.8，證明不用花大錢也能拿到乾淨的第一型跟第三型膠原。精打細算的聰明選擇。

highlights.title: 包裝更環保，粉末沒變
highlights.body: Vital Proteins 2026 新包裝塑膠少 90%,改用 FSC 紙板。配方沒變，但看得出牌子有在用心。
